extortion.description: www.dolidol.ma , https://www.zoominfo.com/c/dolidol/426056693 Established in 1972, Dolidol is one of the oldest mattress manufacturers in Morocco and a leading player in thghout Morocco, perceived as being higher-end with better quality products. Dolidol manufactures and sells polyurethane foam, mattresses and sofas, as well as non-woven textile. Dolidol has developed a wide distribution network in Morocco with 46 owned stores, 10 distribution facilities and over 1,100 distributors.
